Publications

Fuzzy Logic Controller and PID Controller Design for Aircraft Pitch Control

The goal of this paper is to compare a PID controller and a Fuzzy Logic controller in terms of pitch control of an aircraft.

Erdi Sayar, Hüseyin Metin Ertunç

European Conference on Mechanism Science, EuCoMeS’18

pdf

Assistive Handwriting Haptic Mechanism Using Deep Learning Speech Recognition

Learning to handwrite for visually impaired people is a difficult task. Using assistive haptic device during handwriting learning for people having a visual impairment is the objective of this work

Erdi Sayar

Artifical Intelligence and Machine Learning, WCAIML’19

pdf

Control 3R redundant robot with “Withstanding Impacts” and “Generalized Impact Measure” subtasks
